ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "asin" TEXT /* Amazon Standard Identification Number (ASIN) */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the main product image */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the product was added to the platform */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the product was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the product (e.g., active, inactive, discontinued) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the brand logo */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the brand website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product variant */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product the variant belongs to */,
  "variant_name" TEXT /* Name of the variant (e.g., Size, Color) */,
  "variant_value" TEXT /* Value of the variant (e.g., 0.9 oz, Blue) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the variant */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Stock quantity of the variant */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) for the variant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_variants_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product the review is for */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reviewer who wrote the review */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review is verified */,
  "review_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the review was posted */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the review */,
  "unix_review_time" INTEGER /* Unix timestamp of when the review was posted */,
  "vote_count" INTEGER /* Number of votes the review has received */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image associated with the review */,
  "clean_review_text" TEXT /* Cleaned text of the review (for analysis) */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the reviewer (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewers" (
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reviewer */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  "profile_url" TEXT /* URL to the reviewer's profile */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews written by the reviewer */,
  "trusted_reviewer" INTEGER /* Indicates if the reviewer is a trusted reviewer */,
  "badge" TEXT /* Badge or title assigned to the reviewer (e.g., 'Top Reviewer') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the review the vote is for */,
  "voter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who cast the vote */,
  "vote_type" TEXT /* Type of vote (e.g., helpful, not helpful) */,
  "vote_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the vote was cast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_voter_id FOREIGN KEY ("voter_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, customer) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of user registration */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the review the image is associated with */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image */,
  "upload_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the image was uploaded */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_images_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_summary" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews for the product */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the product based on reviews */,
  "total_helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of helpful votes for the product */,
  "total_not_helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of not helpful votes for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product the feature belongs to */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_features_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_flags" (
  "flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flag */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the review the flag is for */,
  "flag_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the flag (e.g., spam, harassment) */,
  "flag_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the flag was raised */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_flags_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the review the response is for */,
  "response_text" TEXT /* Text of the response */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the response was posted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_responses_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, review, vote) */,
  "activity_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the activity occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
